EXPLANATION: Llama 3.1 8B is a well-documented open-weights large language model released by Meta, and the cited URL correctly points to the official model repository on Hugging Face. The attribution to Meta is correct, and the minor metadata mismatch regarding the platform (Hugging Face) does not invalidate the existence of the source.
